Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order That The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Requests For Admission Set One To Defendant Oscar Camacho Cardona Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $5,400.00
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Anup Mehta, Esq. of Wilshire Law Firm, PLC (tel: 213-381-9988) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Athena Budac, Esq. of Matheny Sears Linkert & Jaime, LLP (tel: 916-978-3434) for Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.
Atty. David Beach, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP (tel: 415-362-6000) for Defendant Oscar Camacho Cardona.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GEREMIE DEAN's Motion For An Order That The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Requests For Admission Set One To Defendant Oscar Camacho Cardona Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $5,400.00.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting in part and denying in part Motion for Deemed-Admitted Order and Sanctions. *****

Atty. Anup Mehta, Esq. of Wilshire Law Firm, PLC (tel: 213-381-9988) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Athena Budac, Esq. of Matheny Sears Linkert & Jaime, LLP (tel: 916-978-3434) for Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.
Atty. David Beach, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP (tel: 415-362-6000) for Defendant Oscar Camacho Cardona.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF GEREMIE DEAN's Motion To Compel Defendant Oscar Camacho Cardona To Respond To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $5,400.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
